cases.prompt: Before implementing an OAuth refresh-token expiry fix, prepare auth session invariants, first docs/files, test routing, required approvals, reviewers, and handoff context.
expected_decisions: Auth/session preflight runs before implementation because refresh-token expiry affects auth invariants

cases.prompt: Prepare auth/session preflight context before assigning subagents to investigate JWT cookies, CSRF handling, login redirects, route guards, generated API clients, and auth regression tests.
expected_decisions: Token and cookie values are not read or copied

cases.prompt: Fix the OAuth refresh token bug. AGENTS.md and auth context are already current, and the targeted auth tests are listed.
expected_decisions: Domain preflight is skipped because auth context and test routing are already current

cases.prompt: Update one README sentence about the support email address. No auth/session flow, token handling, cookie behavior, or login redirect changes are involved.
expected_decisions: Auth/session preflight is not needed for unrelated documentation work
